Uses of Package
org.docgene.model.globals

  • Packages that use org.docgene.model.globals 
    Package Description
    org.docgene.api
    This package allows to generate a wiki in another application, using the docGenerator API.
    org.docgene.main
    Contains the entry point of the application.
    org.docgene.model
    Contains the documentation model.
    org.docgene.model.globals
    Contains the global elements for the wiki model.
  • Classes in org.docgene.model.globals used by org.docgene.api 
    Class and Description
    ArticleCategory
    Represents an article category.
    ArticlesModel
    Represents the root for the model.
    DefaultMenuItem
    Represent a default Menu Item.
    ExternalMenuItem
    Represent a Menu Item pointing to an external link.
    InternalMenuItem
    Represent a Menu Item pointing to an internal link.
  • Classes in org.docgene.model.globals used by org.docgene.main 
    Class and Description
    ArticlesModel
    Represents the root for the model.
  • Classes in org.docgene.model.globals used by org.docgene.model 
    Class and Description
    AbstractMenuItem
    Represent a menu item on a left menu in an article, or any other page in the HTML wiki.
    ArticleCategory
    Represents an article category.
    ArticlesModel
    Represents the root for the model.
  • Classes in org.docgene.model.globals used by org.docgene.model.globals 
    Class and Description
    AbstractMenuItem
    Represent a menu item on a left menu in an article, or any other page in the HTML wiki.
    ArticleCategory
    Represents an article category.
    ArticlesCategories
    Represents the articles categories.
    ArticlesDictionary
    Maintains the dictionary of articles sorted by their first letter.
    ArticlesDictionary.Letter
    Represents one Letter in the dictionnary.
    ArticlesGlossary
    Maintains a glossary of terms sorted by their first letter.
    ArticlesGlossary.Letter
    Represents one Letter in the glossary.
    ArticlesGlossary.Word
    Represents one Word in the glossary.
    ArticlesModel
    Represents the root for the model.
    Locales
    The supported locales.
    Localization
    Hold the localization for the wiki.
